name: finding-memo
description: Finding Memo: An AI learning platform for programmers — interactive MARP lessons
author: lotape6

scripts.build:intro: marp lessons/00-introduction/deck.md --theme-set assets/themes/finding-memo.css --html true --allow-local-files -o output/00-introduction.html && bash scripts/inline-images.sh output/00-introduction.html
scripts.build:agent-loop: marp lessons/01-agent-loop/deck.md --theme-set assets/themes/finding-memo.css --html true --allow-local-files -o output/01-agent-loop.html && bash scripts/inline-images.sh output/01-agent-loop.html
